nearestBoundary
signature:
function nearestBoundary(p: Coord, d: number): { coord: Coord; dist: number } {
  const max = d * 2; // grid spans 0..max
  const candidates: { coord: Coord; dist: number }[] = [
    { coord: { x: -1, y: p.y }, dist: p.x + 1 },
    { coord: { x: max + 1, y: p.y }, dist: max - p.x + 1 },
    { coord: { x: p.x, y: -1 }, dist: p.y + 1 },

name: PapersPage
C
signature: type C = { re: number; im: number };

name: cx
signature: cx = (re: number, im = 0): C => ({ re, im })

name: cadd
signature: cadd = (a: C, b: C): C => ({ re: a.re + b.re, im: a.im + b.im })

name: cmul
signature: cmul = (a: C, b: C): C => ({ re: a.re * b.re - a.im * b.im, im: a.re * b.im + a.im * b.re })

name: cabs2
signature: cabs2 = (a: C): number => a.re * a.re + a.im * a.im

name: cabs
signature: cabs = (a: C): number => Math.sqrt(cabs2(a))

name: cphase
signature: cphase = (a: C): number => Math.atan2(a.im, a.re)

name: cexp
signature: cexp = (theta: number): C => ({ re: Math.cos(theta), im: Math.sin(theta) })

name: SQ
signature: SQ = 1 / Math.SQRT2

signature: function involved(op: Op): number[] { return [...op.controls, ...op.targets]; }

signature:

name: DEF
signature: DEF: Record<string, GateDef> = Object.fromEntries(PALETTE.map((g) => [g.type, g]))

name: fmtPi
gcd
signature: function gcd(a: number, b: number): number { return b === 0 ? (a || 1) : gcd(b, a % b); }

name: genQiskit
CELL
signature: CELL = 56

name: LEFT
signature: LEFT = 64

name: TOPP
signature: TOPP = 8

name: rowY
signature: rowY = (q: number) => TOPP + q * CELL + CELL / 2

name: colX
signature: colX = (col: number) => LEFT + col * CELL + CELL / 2

name: UIDC
signature: UIDC = 0

name: uid
signature: uid = () => `op${UIDC++}`

cleanDesc
signature:
function cleanDesc(html: string): string {
  return html
    .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, "")
    .replace(/&/g, "&")
    .replace(/</g, "<")
    .replace(/>/g, ">")
